ops.title: Approve gpt-5.6-luna for bounded recon sweeps after performance validation
ops.body:
# Luna for bounded recon sweeps (v4.1, 2026-07-13)

Empirical measurement (12-brief blind-judged head-to-head, cc-notes note `128bed3`) showed gpt-5.6-luna at xhigh matching sonnet-5's recall (167/173 each) with **zero false cites** at ~5x solo speed (48s vs 230s paired) and ~80% lower cost — but confidently undercounting one exhaustive enumeration ("three" of four, silently). Routing follows the evidence, not the headline.

## Route to luna (via codex, `-c model=gpt-5.6-luna`)

- Config/wiring locates ("where is flag Y defined, read, overridden")
- Crisp-scope enumerations ("every call site of X under dir D")
- Pattern sweeps ("which modules implement P")

**Constraints, both mandatory:**
1. `model_reasoning_effort=xhigh` — luna at `high` drops whole subsystems on deep traces (measured: fk-trace 22/35 vs 31/35 at xhigh).
2. Crisp scope in the brief — a bounded question with a checkable answer set.

## Stay on sonnet-5 (Explore)

- Open-ended or exhaustive recon where a silent miss is costly — luna's measured miss mode is a **confident wrong count**, the failure an orchestrator can't detect without re-checking.
- Deep multi-path traces ("how does subsystem Z work end to end")
- Anything at monorepo scale — luna's MRCR long-context score (41.3%) never got tested here; repos in the experiment were ~270–400 files.

## Surfaces that encode this (keep in sync)

- `plugin/guides/md/claude-rules.md` sonnet-5 + gpt-5.6-sol rows (canonical; CLAUDE.md renders from it)
- `plugins/codex/skills/codex/SKILL.md` § Model Variants and Escalation
- `plugins/codex/agents/codex-wrapper.md` (orchestrator-marked luna swap)
- `plugins/repo-bootstrap/tests/test_scaffold.py` pins "bounded recon sweeps" in all three
- `plugins/repo-bootstrap/skills/repo-bootstrap/reference/base-conventions.md` paraphrase

Shipped in commit 9843473c341a (codex 0.14.0, repo-bootstrap 0.51.3).
ops.when: When deciding model routing for reconnaissance tasks — specifically config/wiring locates, pattern sweeps, and crisp-scope enumerations
